case_title: MALLON, JOHN D. VS CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MALLON, JOHN D. AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLON, JOHN D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC. $1,530.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,580.00, $1420 FOR UNPAID NECESSARY REPAIRS; $110 RENTAL CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC.
